summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CrownFlow SaaS Phase 1 base structure. All core functionality working correctly including backend APIs, authentication flow, landing page, and dashboard protection.

design_issues.issue: Minor horizontal overflow on mobile viewport (404px vs 390px)
Hero button may be below recommended mobile touch target size

passed_tests: Backend API /api/auth/session endpoint exists and validates properly
Backend API /api/business endpoints exist with proper authentication
Landing page loads with hero, features, about, and CTA sections
Header navigation with Recursos and Sobre links work and scroll properly
Entrar button redirects correctly to Google OAuth (auth.emergentagent.com)
Dashboard is properly protected - redirects to home when not authenticated
Dark premium design theme with black, graphite, and gold colors
Mobile responsive design works (with minor overflow issues)
Authentication integration with Emergent Auth working correctly
